16394 "[i:person:me]"
16395 "Róisín Grannell"
16394 10 16395
16396 "[i:year:2012]"
16397 "recap"
16398 "The start of my photography. I had an Olympus XZ-1 and a bridge camera; both of which I loved and neither of which were really great cameras. I didn't take many pictures this year; a few cliche waterfall-but-slow-shutter pictures not fit for upload."
16396 16397 16398
16399 "[i:year:2013]"
16400 "I started to capture pictures of the interesting places I visited. It's also the first year I took a passable photo."
16399 16397 16400
16401 "[i:year:2015]"
16401 16397 31
16402 "[i:year:2016]"
16403 "A big year for me. I started travelling; while sitting in a cafe in Amsterdam a pride parade passed by. Not long afterwards I came out as transgender. I also started taking wildlife photos, a niche I've preferred since then."
16402 16397 16403
16404 "[i:year:2017]"
16405 "Lots of travel, especially around Ireland."
16404 16397 16405
16406 "[i:year:2018]"
16407 "In 2018 I left Europe for the first time, though I have to admit I find America is much pleasant (visually) outside its major cities."
16406 16397 16407
16408 "[i:year:2019]"
16409 "I was indoors for most of 2019, as was everyone else."
16408 16397 16409
16410 "[i:year:2020]"
16411 "Another pandemic year. I did get outside, occassionally, to take some wildlife photos."
16410 16397 16411
16412 "[i:year:2021]"
16413 "I re-visited America, to the mid-west. Chicago was monumental; as someone used to smaller European cities the _extent_ of the city was jaw-dropping. Despite my pre-conceptions, the biodiversity in the US is impressive; birds of prey, sandhill cranes, hummingbirds and woodpeckers were common. Wildlife was more present than in the parts of Europe i was used to."
16412 16397 16413
16414 "[i:year:2022]"
16415 "A big year for travel. I visited London (possibly my favourite city, it's impossible to be bored there), and saw more the rural parts of Wisconsin. The visit to the International Crane Foundation was a highlight; they're really charming birds"
16414 16397 16415
16416 "[i:year:2023]"
16417 "Berlin was a ghost-town when I visited, in the best way. The city was snowed under; I missed virtually every noteworthy sight (the museum's, Aleksanderplatz, dozens other), but I had a good time traipsing around in the snow and visiting Christmas markets."
16416 16397 16417
16418 "[i:year:2024]"
16419 "I saw some of the most beautiful sights on earth this year. I'm really fond of moorish architecture & islamic tilework; Granada, Seville, and Córdoba were jaw-dropping places."
16418 16397 16419
16420 "[i:year:2025]"
16421 "A varied year; I saw the old castle in Conwy, Slovenia, a run across Iberia (seeing more moorish architecture), and the rainforests of Anaga in Tenerife."

17685 "<p>I was pleasantly surprised to see an <a href=\"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isotype_(picture_language)\">isotype</a> book in the Science Museum. I first came across the technique in the <a href=\"https://www.lars-mueller-publishers.com/handbook-tyranny-0\">Handbook of Tyranny</a>, it's an underused way of sharing data in an accesible way.</p>"
